import unreal
# 1) Does ABP exist and compile-load?
abp_path = '/Game/Character/ABP_Bodycam'
abp = unreal.load_asset(abp_path)
print('ABP loaded:', abp)
if abp:
    gen = unreal.load_object(None, abp_path + '.ABP_Bodycam_C')
    print('Generated class:', gen)
# 2) Skeleton bone names
skel = unreal.load_asset('/Game/Character/Hunyuan_Mesh_Skeleton')
print('Skeleton:', skel)
mesh = unreal.load_asset('/Game/Character/SK_Hunyuan')
print('Mesh:', mesh)
if mesh:
    try:
        names = [str(n) for n in unreal.SkeletalMeshEditorSubsystemHelpers.get_bone_names(mesh)] if hasattr(unreal, 'SkeletalMeshEditorSubsystemHelpers') else None
    except Exception as e:
        names = None
    if names is None:
        try:
            lib = unreal.SkeletalMeshEditorSubsystem if hasattr(unreal, 'SkeletalMeshEditorSubsystem') else None
            print('subsys', lib)
        except Exception as e:
            print('err', e)
    # fallback: via skeleton reference pose through anim sequence
    walk = unreal.load_asset('/Game/Character/A_Walk')
    idle = unreal.load_asset('/Game/Character/A_Idle')
    print('Walk:', walk, 'len=', walk.get_play_length() if walk else None)
    print('Idle:', idle, 'len=', idle.get_play_length() if idle else None)
    if walk:
        try:
            tracks = walk.get_animation_track_names()
            print('TRACKS:', [str(t) for t in tracks])
        except Exception as e:
            print('track err', e)
